summary: QA & Hardening iteration: Verified P0 bug fix (Photo to Comic infinite loops) and P1 features (unified backgrounds, HelpGuide on feature pages). All tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: Photo to Comic infinite loop fix correctly implemented using useRef pattern (isPollingRef, pollingIntervalRef, toastShownRef)
stopPolling function properly clears both ref-based and state-based intervals
Toast tracking uses refs instead of state to prevent React re-render loops
HelpGuide component properly imported and rendered on all tested pages
Unified background gradient (from-slate-950 via-indigo-950 to-slate-950) consistent across pages

details: useRef pattern implemented for polling control
No toast spam detected (0 active toasts after navigation)
Normal console activity (3 messages in 5 seconds)
Polling stops correctly on job completion/failure

pages_verified: Photo to Comic - HelpGuide present with correct 'Photo to Comic' content ✓

photo_to_comic.mode_selection: Comic Avatar and Comic Strip modes present
photo_to_comic.wizard_navigation: Back button correctly returns to mode selection

help_guide_panel.styling: Gradient purple-pink button with pulse animation
help_guide_panel.panel_content: Title, description, credits, steps, tips, quick tour

context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo to Comic infinite loop bug fixed via useRef pattern. HelpGuide component added to 23+ feature pages with contextual help content. Unified background colors applied to all pages. All features working correctly.
